title: UP TGT 2022 Result 2026 – Declared
description: Uttar Pradesh UPSESSB UP TGT 2022 Result 2026 for 3539 Post Post Update Date: 30-06-2026 Short Details: UP TGT 2022 Result 2026 | Uttar Pradesh Secondary Education Service Selection Board (UPSESSB) has released the Admit Card of Trained Graduate Teacher TGT Teacher Recruitment for 3539 posts. Those who are interested in this recruitment and fulfill the eligibility can apply online from 09 June 2022 to 03 July 2022. For the information of eligibility, age limit, selection procedure, pay scale,...
